title: Supplemental Appropriation
text: The legislature passes an emergency defense supplemental. Your budget expands this quarter.

title: Deception Operation Detected — Too Late
text: The Rival has been feeding your collection a curated picture. Your intent estimates have been running optimistic.

title: Domestic Political Crisis
text: A budget standoff at home consumes the leadership's attention, degrading your capacity to act decisively.

title: Regional Economic Shock
text: A commodity shock ripples through the region. For a Rival whose clock is already ticking, the pressure to move rises.
